data.title: Kansas City Royals and Sun Life raise $50,000 for Boys & Girls Clubs of Greater Kansas City through Strikeout Diabetes campaign.
data.description: In Kansas City, Missouri, on September 19, 2025, Sun Life U.S. and The Kansas City Royals Foundation collaborated for the eighth consecutive year, collecting $50,000 for the Boys & Girls Clubs of Greater Kansas City as part of their yearly Strikeout Diabetes initiative. The donation was officially handed over by Sun Life.

data.title: Village Super Market, Inc. (NSD-VLGEA) declares $0.25 dividend per Class A share and $0.1625 per Class B share; payable Oct 23, 2025.
data.description: On September 19, 2025, in Springfield, New Jersey, the Board of Directors of Village Super Market, Inc. (NSD-VLGEA) announced quarterly cash dividends. Shareholders holding Class A common shares will receive $0.25 per share, while those holding Class B common shares will receive $0.1625 per share. The dividends are scheduled to be paid on October 23, 2025, to shareholders on record as of October 2, 2025.

data.title: NVIDIA and Berkeley Lab develop HENS, a weather prediction tool, providing supercomputer-level forecast with lower cost and power.
data.description: NVIDIA and Berkeley Lab have joined forces to unveil HENS, a pioneering machine learning solution aimed at forecasting extreme weather events. This innovative tool provides supercomputer-level predictions while significantly cutting down on both computational requirements and associated expenses. Explore further details on this groundbreaking advancement.

data.title: Mr. Cooper Group Inc. Board declared $2 dividend for common stock, record date on Sept 29, 2025.
data.description: Mr. Cooper Group Inc. declared a dividend today for holders of common stock, par value $0.01 per share, consisting of $2.00 in cash per share. The record date for determining the entitlement to the dividend is September 29, 2025.

data.title: Pintec (Nasdaq: PT) releases unaudited financial results for H1 2025. Providing financial services to SMEs in China.
data.description: On September 19, 2025, in Beijing, Pintec Technology Holdings Limited (Nasdaq: PT), a company listed on the Nasdaq, disclosed its unaudited financial information. Pintec specializes in offering technology-driven financial and digital solutions to micro, small, and medium-sized enterprises in China.

data.title: RBI advised shareholders to reject Ocehan's mini-tender offer for 50,000 shares, 0.02% of total.
data.description: Restaurant Brands International Inc. (QSR) has received notice of an unsolicited mini-tender offer from Ocehan LLC to acquire up to 50,000 of RBI's common shares, representing about 0.02% of the total shares outstanding. This offer was made on September 19, 2025, and RBI trades on both the NYSE and TSX under the symbols QSR.

data.title: AAM upsizes offering to $850 million for 6.375% senior secured notes and senior unsecured notes.
data.description: In Detroit, on September 19, 2025, American Axle & Manufacturing Holdings, Inc. (NYSE: AXL) revealed that its subsidiary, American Axle & Manufacturing, Inc. , has set the price for its latest offering of $850 million of 6.375% senior notes.

data.title: Sunrise Manor Nursing & Rehabilitation Center unveils new leadership, plans for renovations to enhance care services.
data.description: Sunrise Manor Nursing & Rehabilitation Center offers top-quality short-term rehabilitation and long-term skilled nursing care in a caring, patient-centered setting. The center provides expert therapy programs, advanced clinical services, and compassionate staff committed to delivering exceptional care.

data.title: Ultragenyx granted 48,561 stock units to 17 new non-executive officers, per Nasdaq rule 5635(c)(4).
data.description: On September 19, 2025, Ultragenyx Pharmaceutical Inc., a biopharmaceutical company traded on NASDAQ under the symbol RARE, announced the allocation of 48,561 restricted stock units of its common stock to 17 recently recruited non-executive officers. These stock units were granted as part of the Ultragenyx Employment Inducement Plan on September 16, 2025, approved by the compensation committee of the company’s board of directors. This move was made to incentivize and attract new talent as per Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4).

data.title: Wellchange Holdings Co. Limited to raise $4M in private placement offering 100M Class A shares at $0.04/share.
data.description: On September 9, 2025, Wellchange Holdings Company Limited ("WCT") revealed that they recently signed a securities purchase agreement with specific investors for the acquisition and sale of a total of 100,000,000 Class A ordinary shares of the Company, each with a par value of $0.00005. The purchase price per share in this private placement Offering is approximately $0.04. Wellchange Holdings traded as "WCT" on Nasdaq.

data.title: IDACORP raises quarterly cash dividend to $0.88 per share, $3.52 annually. Board has increased dividend yearly since 2011.
data.description: In Boise, Idaho, IDACORP, Inc. disclosed that their board sanctioned a rise in the usual quarterly cash dividend for IDACORP’s common stock to $0.88 per share. This adjustment elevates the annual indicated dividend to $3.52 per share. The Board of Directors at IDACORP has consistently endorsed dividend hikes annually starting from 2011, amassing a total increase of 193% and a compound annual growth rate of 7.4% since 2011, as stated by Lisa Gro.

data.title: Arizona Cardinals partner with Lumifi, a Scottsdale cybersecurity company, for multi-year deal focusing on defending against cyber threats. Strengthening the team's technology with cutting-edge solutions.
data.description: In a recent announcement from Tempe, Arizona, the Arizona Cardinals Football Club has joined forces with Lumifi, a prominent cybersecurity company based in Scottsdale, in a long-term collaboration focused on defense, innovation, and community support. This strategic partnership aims to enhance the Cardinals' cybersecurity defenses by leveraging state-of-the-art solutions provided by Lumifi. The initiative underscores the team's commitment to safeguarding its technology infrastructure against cyber threats, mirroring the importance of solid defense in winning on-field games. This collaboration not only bolsters the Cardinals' cybersecurity resilience but also highlights their dedication to local partnerships and technological advancement.

data.title: Royalty Pharma to speak at Bernstein’s Healthcare Forum on Sept 23, 2025, at 2:50 pm ET. ($RPRX)
data.description: On September 19, 2025, Royalty Pharma plc (Nasdaq: RPRX) revealed its plan to join a fireside chat at Bernstein’s 2nd Annual Healthcare Forum on September 23, 2025, at 2:50 p.m. Eastern Time.

data.title: HUHUTECH International Group Inc. (Nasdaq: HUHU) reveals unaudited financial results for first half of fiscal year 2025.
data.description: In WUXI, China on September 19, 2025, HUHUTECH International Group Inc. (Nasdaq: HUHU) unveiled its unaudited financial performance for the initial six months of fiscal year 2025. HUHUTECH specializes in offering factory facility management and monitoring solutions. The company reported key financial figures for this period, though the source did not provide specific details on the numbers.

data.title: Frontdoor and American Home Shield honor tradesmen on National Tradesmen Day for their dedication and skill. #FTDR #NASDAQ
data.description: Frontdoor, Inc. (NASDAQ: FTDR), a prominent home service warranties provider based in Memphis, Tennessee, is acknowledging National Tradesman Day by honoring the skilled Pros who drive the industry forward. Chairman Bill Cobb expressed gratitude for the craftsmanship, dedication, and determination of these individuals, emphasizing their role in not only constructing buildings but also fostering trust and building communities. The company celebrates its collaboration with independent contractor tradesmen, recognizing their contributions on this special day and every day.

data.title: MBX Biosciences will release Phase 2 trial results of once-weekly Canvuparatide for HP on Sept 22, 2025 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE).
data.description: On September 19, 2025, in Carmel, Indiana, MBX Biosciences, Inc. (Nasdaq: MBX), a biopharmaceutical company in its clinical-stage, revealed plans to release top-line findings from a Phase 2 clinical trial for a potential once-weekly canvuparatide treatment targeting patients with chronic hypoparathyroidism. This trial focuses on exploring novel precision peptide therapies for endocrine and metabolic disorders. An investor webcast is scheduled for September 22nd to discuss the outcomes.
